assignments.direction: Implement and benchmark basic dispatching rules including Earliest Due Date (EDD), Shortest Processing Time (SPT), and Modified Due Date (MDD) to establish a performance baseline.
Develop a Simulated Annealing (SA) metaheuristic using a swap-based neighborhood and a geometric cooling schedule, focusing on the transition from exploration to exploitation.
Implement a Genetic Algorithm (GA) using Order Crossover (OX) and swap mutation, with a focus on maintaining population diversity to avoid premature convergence.
Design a Variable Neighborhood Search (VNS) algorithm that cycles through swap, insertion, and 2-opt (reversal) neighborhoods to escape local minima.
Formulate an Integer Linear Programming (ILP) model using sequence-position variables and solve it using a standard solver for small-to-medium instances.
Develop a Constraint Programming (CP) approach utilizing interval variables and the 'noOverlap' constraint to efficiently prune the search space.
Implement a Tabu Search (TS) algorithm with a tabu list of recent job moves and an aspiration criterion to allow moves that improve the best-known solution.
Explore an Ant Colony Optimization (ACO) metaheuristic where pheromone levels represent the preference for scheduling specific jobs in specific sequence positions.
